lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਰਾਵੈ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਸੋਹਾਗੋ ॥੧੭॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ahinis raavai preetam har var thir sohaago |17|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, day and night, my Beloved enjoys me; with the Lord as my Husband, my Marriage is Eternal. ||17||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਖਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tukhaaree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Tukhaari, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲੈ ਪਹਰੈ ਨੈਣ ਸਲੋਨੜੀਏ ਰੈਣਿ ਅੰਧਿਆਰੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: pahilai paharai nain salonarree rain andhiaaree raam |
lines.english: In the first watch of the dark night, O bride of splendored eyes,

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਖਰੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਮੁਈਏ ਆਵੈ ਵਾਰੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: vakhar raakh mueee aavai vaaree raam |
lines.english: protect your riches; your turn is coming soon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਰੀ ਆਵੈ ਕਵਣੁ ਜਗਾਵੈ ਸੂਤੀ ਜਮ ਰਸੁ ਚੂਸਏ ॥
lines.translit: vaaree aavai kavan jagaavai sootee jam ras choose |
lines.english: When your turn comes, who will wake you? While you sleep, your juice shall be sucked out by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਅੰਧੇਰੀ ਕਿਆ ਪਤਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਚੋਰੁ ਪੜੈ ਘਰੁ ਮੂਸਏ ॥
lines.translit: rain andheree kiaa pat teree chor parrai ghar moose |
lines.english: The night is so dark; what will become of your honor? The thieves will break into your home and rob you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਣਹਾਰਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਮੇਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: raakhanahaaraa agam apaaraa sun benantee mereea |
lines.english: O Saviour Lord, Inaccessible and Infinite, please hear my prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਕਿਆ ਸੂਝੈ ਰੈਣਿ ਅੰਧੇਰੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak moorakh kabeh na chetai kiaa soojhai rain andhereea |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the fool never remembers Him; what can he see in the dark of night? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਪਹਰੁ ਭਇਆ ਜਾਗੁ ਅਚੇਤੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa pehar bheaa jaag achetee raam |
lines.english: The second watch has begun; wake up, you unconscious being!

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਹੁ ਖੇਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਹੇਤੀ ਜਾਗਤ ਚੋਰੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: raakhahu khetee har gur hetee jaagat chor na laagai |
lines.english: Protect your crops, and love the Lord, the Guru. Stay awake and aware, and the thieves shall not rob you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਖਰੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਮੁਈਏ ਖਾਜੈ ਖੇਤੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: vakhar raakh mueee khaajai khetee raam |
lines.english: Protect your riches, O mortal; your farm is being eaten.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਮਗਿ ਨ ਜਾਵਹੁ ਨਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਡਰੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jam mag na jaavahu naa dukh paavahu jam kaa ddar bhau bhaagai |
lines.english: You shall not have to go on the path of Death, and you shall not suffer in pain; your fear and terror of death shall run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਸਸਿ ਦੀਪਕ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਆਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: rav sas deepak guramat duaarai man saachaa mukh dhiaave |
lines.english: The lamps of the sun and the moon are lit by the Guru's Teachings, through His Door, meditating on the True Lord, in the mind and with the mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਅਜਹੁ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਕਿਵ ਦੂਜੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak moorakh ajahu na chetai kiv doojai sukh paave |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the fool still does not remember the Lord. How can he find peace in duality? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਸੁਤ ਦਾਰਾ ਦੂਖਿ ਸੰਤਾਪੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa sut daaraa dookh santaapee raam |
lines.english: The mortal suffers in pain, from attachment to Maya, children and spouse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਸੁਤ ਦਾਰਾ ਜਗਤ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਚੋਗ ਚੁਗੈ ਨਿਤ ਫਾਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa sut daaraa jagat piaaraa chog chugai nit faasai |
lines.english: Maya, his children, his wife and the world are so dear to him; he bites the bait, and is caught.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਜਾ ਪਹਰੁ ਭਇਆ ਨੀਦ ਵਿਆਪੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: teejaa pehar bheaa need viaapee raam |
lines.english: The third watch has begun, and sleep has set in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਛੋਡੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੰਤਾਪੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran kaal nahee chhoddai vin naavai santaapee |
lines.english: He cannot escape from birth, dying and death; without the Name, he suffers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਗ੍ਰਾਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaavai taa sukh paavai guramat kaal na graasai |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he shall find peace; following the Guru's Teachings, he shall not be seized by death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੀਜੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਬਿਧਿ ਲੋਕਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਆਪੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak teejai tribidh lokaa maaeaa mohi viaapee |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, in the third watch of the three-phased Maya, the world is engrossed in attachment to Maya. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥਾ ਪਹਰੁ ਭਇਆ ਦਉਤੁ ਬਿਹਾਗੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: chauthaa pehar bheaa daut bihaagai raam |
lines.english: The fourth watch has begun, and the day is about to dawn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਛਿ ਜਾਗੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਤਿਨਾ ਰੈਣਿ ਸੁਹੇਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur poochh jaage naam laage tinaa rain suheleea |
lines.english: The night is pleasant and peaceful, for those who remain awake; following the Guru's advice, they focus on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਘਰੁ ਰਾਖਿਅੜਾ ਜੋੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਗੈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: tin ghar raakhiarraa jo anadin jaagai raam |
lines.english: Those who remain awake and aware, night and day, preserve and protect their homes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਕੰਪਿ ਚਰਣ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਕੰਪੈ ਨੈਣ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਤਨੁ ਭਸਮ ਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: kar kanp charan sareer kanpai nain andhule tan bhasam se |
lines.english: The hands shake, the feet and body totter, the vision goes dark, and the body turns to dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਹਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬੇਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabad kamaaveh janam na aaveh tinaa har prabh beleea |
lines.english: Those who practice the Word of the Guru's Shabad are not reincarnated again; the Lord God is their Best Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਖੀਆ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak dukheea jug chaare bin naam har ke man vase |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, people are miserable throughout the four ages, if the Name of the Lord does not abide in the mind. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਿ ਚਲਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਇਆ ਨਾ ਦੀਸੈ ਨਾ ਸੁਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bandh chalaaeaa jaa prabh bhaaeaa naa deesai naa suneeai |
lines.english: You shall be bound and gagged, when it pleases God; you will not see or hear it coming.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਕਸ ਸੁਖ ਠਾਕੇ ਬੰਧਿ ਚਲਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ras kas sukh tthaake bandh chalaaeaa raam |
lines.english: Pleasures and comforts are gone; like a prisoner, you are driven on.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੂਲੀ ਗੰਠਿ ਉਠੋ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਆਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: khoolee gantth uttho likhiaa aaeaa raam |
lines.english: The knot has been untied; rise up - the order has come!

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜੀ ਚਸੇ ਕਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਲੀਜੈ ਬੁਰਾ ਭਲਾ ਸਹੁ ਜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gharree chase kaa lekhaa leejai buraa bhalaa sahu jeea |
lines.english: The account is kept for every second, every instant; the soul suffers for the bad and the good.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣ ਵਾਰੀ ਸਭਸੈ ਆਵੈ ਪਕੀ ਖੇਤੀ ਲੁਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aapan vaaree sabhasai aavai pakee khetee luneeai |
lines.english: Everyone will have their turn; the crop ripens, and then it is cut down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕੀਆ ॥੫॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sur nar sabad milaae tin prabh kaaran keea |5|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the angelic beings are united with the Word of the Shabad; this is the way God made it. ||5||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਪੂਰ ਕਰੰਮਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਦਿਖਾਲਿਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sevak poor karamaa satigur sabad dikhaaliaa raam |
lines.english: The True Guru reveals the Word of the Shabad to His servant who has such perfect karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਰਾ ਚੜਿਆ ਲੰਮਾ ਕਿਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: taaraa charriaa lamaa kiau nadar nihaaliaa raam |
lines.english: The meteor shoots across the sky. How can it be seen with the eyes?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਖਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tukhaaree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Tukhaari, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਦਿਖਾਲਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲਿਆ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur sabad dikhaaliaa sach samaaliaa ahinis dekh beechaariaa |
lines.english: The Guru reveals the Shabad; dwelling on the True Lord, day and night, he beholds and reflects on God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਭਈ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਖੀ ਚੀਨੇ ਰਾਮ ਕਰੰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: antar jot bhee gur saakhee cheene raam karamaa |
lines.english: His inner being is illuminated, by the Guru's Teachings; He beholds the Lord's play of karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤ ਪੰਚ ਰਹੇ ਘਰੁ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavat panch rahe ghar jaaniaa kaam krodh bikh maariaa |
lines.english: The five restless desires are restrained, and he knows the home of his own heart. He conquers sexual desire, anger and corruption.
